symptoms: Dark brown circular spots on older leaves
Spots have concentric rings like a target
Yellow halo around spots
Leaves turn yellow and drop
organic_treatments: Spray Trichoderma viride 5g per litre of water
Apply neem oil 3ml per litre every 7 days
Spray copper oxychloride 3g per litre
Remove and destroy infected leaves immediately
prevention: Maintain proper plant spacing for air circulation

symptoms: Water soaked grey-green spots on leaves
White fungal growth on underside of leaves
Brown rotting of stems and fruits
Rapid collapse of entire plant in wet weather
organic_treatments: Spray Pseudomonas fluorescens 5g per litre
Apply Bordeaux mixture 1% on leaves
Remove infected plants and burn them
Spray neem seed kernel extract 5%
prevention: Avoid planting in low lying areas
Apply mulch to reduce soil splash

symptoms: Diamond shaped spots on leaves with grey centre
Brown to black spots on neck of plant
Finger millets turn black and shrivel
Neck breaks causing ear head to fall
organic_treatments: Seed treatment with Trichoderma viride 4g per kg seed
Spray Pseudomonas fluorescens 5g per litre at booting stage
Apply neem cake 250kg per acre to soil
Spray cow urine diluted 1:10 on leaves
prevention: Use blast resistant varieties like GPU-28
Sow at recommended time to avoid humid conditions

symptoms: Dead heart symptom in vegetative stage
Central shoot dries up and turns brown
White ear symptom at flowering stage
Holes visible on stem near base
organic_treatments: Release Trichogramma japonicum 1 lakh eggs per acre
Apply neem oil 3% spray on stems
Set up light traps to catch adult moths
Apply Beauveria bassiana 5g per litre of water
prevention: Remove and destroy stubble after harvest
Avoid excess nitrogen which attracts pests
Maintain proper water level in field

symptoms: Circular burnt patches in field called hopper burn
Plants turn yellow then brown in patches
Insects visible at base of plant near water level
Honeydew secretion causes sooty mould growth
organic_treatments: Spray neem seed kernel extract 5% on plant base
Apply fish meal wash to repel hoppers
Drain field water for 3 days to expose insects
Release Cyrtorhinus lividipennis natural predator
prevention: Maintain spacing to allow air movement

symptoms: Holes in flower buds and bolls
Frass visible near entry holes
Shedding of flower buds and young bolls
Caterpillars visible inside damaged bolls
organic_treatments: Spray Bacillus thuringiensis 2g per litre of water
Apply neem oil 5ml per litre every 10 days
Set up pheromone traps 5 per acre
Spray neem seed kernel extract 5%
prevention: Plant trap crops like marigold around field border
Remove and destroy affected plant parts

symptoms: Small brown circular spots on leaves
Spots surrounded by yellow halo
Early and late leaf spot appear together
Severe defoliation in advanced stage
organic_treatments: Spray Trichoderma viride 5g per litre
Apply neem oil 3ml per litre every 10 days
Spray cow urine 10% solution on leaves
Remove severely infected leaves and destroy
prevention: Treat seeds with Trichoderma before sowing

symptoms: Yellowing of lower leaves first
Leaves collapse and hang down like skirt
Brown discolouration inside pseudostem when cut
Plant wilts and dies without recovery
organic_treatments: Apply Trichoderma viride 50g per plant in soil
Drench soil with Pseudomonas fluorescens 10g per litre
Apply neem cake 2kg per plant
Remove and destroy infected plants including roots
prevention: Use disease free tissue culture plants
Avoid planting in previously infected soil
Do not injure roots during cultivation

symptoms: Small white sunken spots on leaves
Spots enlarge with purple centre
Leaves dry from tip downward
Severe infection causes complete leaf death
organic_treatments: Spray Trichoderma viride 5g per litre
Apply neem oil 3ml per litre every 7 days
Spray garlic extract 5% on leaves
Remove infected leaves and burn
prevention: Use disease free seeds and sets

symptoms: Tips of branches dry from top downward
Dark brown lesions on stems and branches
Fruits shrivel and turn dark
Entire branch dies progressively
organic_treatments: Spray Bordeaux mixture 1% on affected branches
Apply Trichoderma viride 5g per litre
Prune and destroy infected branches immediately
Spray neem oil 5ml per litre every 10 days
prevention: Treat seeds with Trichoderma before sowing
Maintain proper nutrition with organic manures
